project.name: HacashBuilders
project.description: HacashBuilders is a hybrid builder-community asset formed through HACD Stack. Each unique HACD becomes a permanent Builder ID and forms a fixed share of the fungible BUILD token.

asset.utility_summary: Each BUILD unit represents one share of a builder-community membership formed through a HACD Stack lot, while the unique HACD name acts as a permanent on-chain Builder ID. Holders can use BUILD for community participation and (planned) governance weight and builder-network access.

copy.headline: Builder identity, formed through HACD.
copy.subheadline: HacashBuilders issues BUILD — a hybrid community asset where each HACD becomes a permanent Builder ID and forms a fixed share of a hard-capped supply.
copy.short_description: BUILD is formed across 500 HACD lots at 50 HAC each. Each lot forms 20,000 BUILD and one unique Builder ID. Total supply is 10,000,000 BUILD. No inflation. No hidden allocation. Formed on-chain.
copy.risk_disclosure: BUILD is a community Stack Asset, not an investment product. No price, liquidity, listing, or return is guaranteed. Future utility features (governance, builder-network access) depend on development. Formation cost is non-refundable. This is a draft structure pending HACD Labs review.

notes: Generated by HACD Incubator AI Issuance Skill for HacashBuilders.
All parameters marked as draft. Issuer confirmation required before Launchpad publication.
Hybrid FT+NFT: BUILD is the fungible balance, the HACD name is the unique Builder ID. Confirm transferability intent for the Builder ID.
Governance and builder-network utility are planned only — must not be promised in public copy.
Maximum 10 HACD per participant must be enforced at Launchpad level.
500 lots is 5x the StackFire reference — HACD Labs should confirm demand and consider a phased rollout.
